_comment: Canonical radar voice vocabulary. id -> spoken text. Generated ONCE into app/public/voice/<id>.mp3 by scripts/gen-voice-clips.mjs (OpenAI TTS). Kept in sync with app/src/voiceClips.ts by voiceClips.test.ts. British English, calm navigation tone.
state-compass-unreliable: Compass unreliable. Using your direction of travel.
state-stale: Their location is stale. Follow with care.
